<p>A Nepal commission has recommended the prosecution of ex-prime minister KP Sharma Oli in connection with the <a href="https://www.dawn.com/news/1940738">deadly September 2025 uprising</a> that toppled his government, according to a leaked report.</p>

news.headline: Pakistan says it is mediating US-Iran talks
news.summary: Pakistan says it is mediating indirect talks between the US and Iran aimed at ending the war.
